subHeadline: Answer a few questions about your symptoms — we'll match you against 15+ known JLR failure patterns, show you the likely diagnosis, OEM part references, and an honest repair vs. replace cost estimate.

steps.title: Tell us your symptoms
steps.text: Select from common failure categories or use the shortcut grid if you already know the fault.

steps.title: Tell us about your vehicle
steps.text: Age and estimated value help us calculate whether repair or replacement makes financial sense.

steps.title: Get your diagnosis
steps.text: We'll show you the likely fault, OEM part numbers, severity level, and a transparent cost breakdown.

calculator.title: Tell us your symptoms
calculator.instruction: Select from common failure categories or use the shortcut grid if you already know the fault.

signals.title: EM-VERIFIED Data
signals.text: Every cost range and enquiry volume comes from real 2025 UK data — not estimates or guesswork.

signals.title: JLR-Specific Knowledge
signals.text: We use exact JLR terminology (EAS, Terrain Response, TDV6, SDV6, Ingenium) and OEM part numbers.

signals.title: Vetted Specialist Network
signals.text: Our recommendations route you to 20+ JLR specialists who work on these vehicles daily.

signals.title: Honest Verdict System
signals.text: We tell you when replacement isn't worth it — not every site does that.

exampleResult.title: Likely Diagnosis
exampleResult.symptomsMatch: Cold-start knock, metallic tapping, loss of oil pressure

bottomCta.title: Get your exact verdict
bottomCta.text: Answer a few questions for a diagnosis matched to your Land Rover or Range Rover.

costTable.title: Typical UK Land Rover & Range Rover Replacement Costs
